autocomplete.label: Suggestions
backup.blurb: Export everything (subscriptions, settings, notifications, Pro key) as a single file. Use it to move between devices or keep a safety copy.
backup.confirmImport: This replaces every subscription on this device with the backup. Continue?
backup.exportSub: A small JSON file you can keep anywhere
backup.importSub: Replace current data with a backup file
backup.invalidFile: That doesn't look like a Leakd backup file.
backup.title: Backup & restore
bank.blurb: Upload a CSV from your bank — Revolut, Wise, N26, PayPal, Chase, Amex. We parse it locally and detect recurring charges. Nothing leaves your device.
bank.errorColumns: Couldn't find date/description/amount columns in this file.
bank.noRecurring: No recurring charges detected. Try a 3+ month statement.
bank.title: Import bank statement
bench.title: How you compare
budgets.blurb: Set a monthly limit for each category. We'll show your progress and warn when you go over.
budgets.empty: No budgets set yet. Tap a category below to set one.
budgets.proLock: Budgets are a Pro feature. Upgrade to unlock.
budgets.title: Category budgets
bundles.empty: No bundle savings available right now.
bundles.title: Bundle suggestions
cal.noDates: No renewal dates to export yet

cancelled.confirmPurge: Permanently delete this cancellation record? Stats will lose this win.
cancelled.confirmRestore: Restore this subscription back to your active list?
cancelled.empty: No cancellations yet. When you kill a sub, we'll celebrate it here.
cancelled.title: Cancelled subscriptions
compare.blurb: Pick 2 or 3 subscriptions. We line them up so you can see which one to cut.
compare.minPrompt: Pick at least 2 subscriptions to compare
compare.pickPrompt: Tap to select up to 3 subscriptions
compare.title: Compare side-by-side
confirm.markCancelled: Mark this subscription as cancelled? It moves to your cancelled list and stops counting in totals.
demo.injected: 8 example subs added — explore freely, reset anytime

empty.sub: Tap the + button or paste a list to start
empty.title: No subscriptions yet
field.name: Name
field.notesPh: What's worth remembering about this sub?
field.sharedNote: Total cost stays the same — we just show your share too
forecast.none: No renewals coming up. Breathe easy.
forecast.title: Next {n} days
goal.blurb: How much do you want to save this year by canceling subs? We track your wins.
goal.empty: Set a goal to start tracking.
goal.estimate: Cancel {count} low-rated subs to save {savings}/mo and hit your goal in {months} months!
goal.label: Target amount
goal.title: Savings goal
health.adviceBudget: You went over a category budget this month. Trim or rebalance.
health.adviceEmpty: Add subscriptions and rate them to see your score.
health.adviceGeneral: Healthy mix. Keep your trials and ratings up to date.
health.adviceIncome: Subscriptions are taking a big share of your income. Cancel candidates with low ratings.
health.advicePerfect: You're crushing it. Keep this up.
health.adviceRating: Some of your subs are rated low. Those are easy cuts.
health.adviceTrial: A free trial is about to auto-renew. Decide before it charges you.
health.title: Subscription health
import.blurb: Paste one subscription per line. We'll try to detect the service and price automatically.
import.nothingFound: Nothing detected — try one item per line, e.g. "Netflix 15.99"
import.placeholder:
Netflix 15.99
Spotify 10.99
ChatGPT 20
Notion 10/mo
Adobe yearly 599
import.title: Bulk import
income.blurb: Optional. We use it to show what share of your income goes to subscriptions. Stored on this device only.
income.empty: Set your income to see the ratio.
income.label: Net monthly income
income.ratio.label: of your income
income.title: Monthly income
insights.noSubs: Add some subscriptions to see suggestions
insights.shareSub: Generate a shareable image for Twitter, IG, or Reddit
lifetime.inflationNote: Most subs raise prices 3-7%/year. We project 5% — typical for SaaS.
lifetime.title: Lifetime cost
menu.backupSub: Save your data to a file or restore it
menu.bankSub: Auto-detect subs from Revolut, Wise, Chase, etc.
menu.cancelledSub: See what you killed and how much you saved
menu.footer: Leakd v1.2 · made for indie wallets
menu.goalSub: Set a target — we celebrate every milestone
menu.importSub: Paste a list or upload CSV
menu.incomeSub: See what % of your income goes to subs
menu.taxSub: PDF + CSV of every business-flagged subscription
tax.blurb: Generates a PDF + CSV from every subscription you've flagged as a business expense. Hand it to your accountant — it includes vendor links, billing cycles, monthly and annual totals.
tax.disclaimer: This report is for informational purposes only and does not constitute official tax or accounting advice. The user is responsible for the accuracy of the submitted data.
tax.empty: No subscriptions are flagged as business expenses yet. Open any subscription and tick the "Business expense" checkbox to include it here.
tax.title: Business tax report
menu.themeSub: Light, dark, or follow your system
menu.whatifSub: Pick subs to cancel — see savings live
notif.beforeTrial: Remind me before free trial ends
notif.blurb: Get a heads-up before subscriptions renew or free trials end. Browser notifications fire locally from this device — no account needed.
notif.deniedHint: Your browser blocked notifications for this site. Open the site settings (lock icon in the address bar) and allow notifications, then come back here.
notif.testBody: You'll get a heads-up before your subscriptions renew.
notif.title: Notifications
onb1.body: Add the subscriptions you pay for. We'll show you the damage — and how to stop it.
onb1.title: Where's your money leaking?
onb.legalAccept: I have read and accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
onb2.body: Your data lives on your device by default — no account needed. Pro features like Cloud Sync and Email Reminders are opt-in and clearly marked. Open the menu anytime to export or wipe everything.
onb2.title: Stays on your device
onb3.body: Allow notifications and we'll ping you before a free trial auto-renews. You can change this anytime.
onb3.title: Get a heads-up
panic.intro: These subscriptions are costing you the most for the least value. Cut them now to stop the leak.
panic.sub: Spending is high. Time to cut the leaks.
panic.title: Panic Mode: Active
personality.aiHoarderTag: Collecting AI tools faster than they ship updates
personality.bundleMasterTag: You know how to stack savings
personality.forgottenTag: You have subs older than a year you never rate
personality.minimalistTag: Few subs, all rated high. Inspiration.
personality.productivityStackTag: Five or more work tools — power user energy
personality.quietCutterTag: You've killed multiple subs this year — quietly winning
personality.spiralerTag: Ten or more active subs. Maybe time to audit?
personality.startingTag: Welcome — every leak begins with one drip
personality.streamingJunkieTag: Three or more entertainment subs — you love your shows
personality.title: Your subscription personality
playbook.title: How to cancel
pro.playNote: Purchases are tied to your Google Account.
pro.thanks: Thanks for supporting indie software. All premium features are unlocked.
pro.title: Leakd Pro
reset.confirm1: This wipes every subscription and setting on this device. Continue?
share.note: Posts well on Twitter, Instagram, and Reddit. Tag @LeakdApp if you share!
share.title: Your leak card
shortcut.title: Keyboard shortcuts
streak.msg: Did you resist a new subscription today?
streak.msgDone: Great job! See you tomorrow to keep the screen clean.
sug.dup.body: You're paying for {names}. Keeping only one could save you up to {savings}/yr.
sug.dup.title: {count} overlapping {cat} subscriptions
sug.expensive.body: {monthly}/mo = {yearly}/year. When was the last time you used it?
sug.expensive.title: {name} is your biggest leak
sug.old.body: Still actively using it? You've paid {paid} so far for it.
sug.old.title: {name} has been on your list for 6+ months
sug.trial.body: Will auto-renew at {price}. Cancel now if you don't want it.
sug.trial.title: {name} trial ends {when}
sug.yearly.body: Most services offer ~15–20% off when paid annually. Switching could save ~{savings}/yr.
sug.yearly.title: Switch {name} to yearly billing
sug.zombie.body: You haven't used this for over 30 days. Cancel it to save {monthly}/mo.
sug.zombie.title: {name} is a zombie
notif.trial.title: {name} free trial ends {when}
notif.trial.body: Will auto-renew at {price}. Cancel now if you don't want it.
notif.renew.title: {name} renews {when}
notif.test.title: Leakd notifications are on
notif.test.body: You'll get a heads-up before your subscriptions renew.
trends.title: Spending trend
trends.up: {arrow} {pct} this period — {amount} more than 6 months ago
trends.down: {arrow} {pct} this period — {amount} less than 6 months ago
trends.flat: No change over the last few months
tour.s1.body: This is the total of every active subscription, updated as you add or pause them.
tour.s1.title: Your monthly leak
tour.s2.body: Tap the + button. Start typing — we know 60+ services and auto-fill the price.
tour.s2.title: Add a subscription
tour.s3.body: Insights shows your spending by category, lifetime cost, and what you would have had if you invested instead.
tour.s3.title: See where it goes
tour.s4.body: Language, currency, bank import, goals, cancelled subs — open the menu anytime.
tour.s4.title: Everything else lives here
whatif.blurb: Tap subscriptions to mark them as cancelled in this scenario. We show what you would save without changing your real data.
whatif.title: What-if calculator
yearend.emptySub: Add some subscriptions and check back here later in the year.
yearend.title: Your {year} wrap-up
sync.title: Cloud sync
sync.blurb: End-to-end encrypted backup to your own Google Drive. Your master password never leaves this device.
sync.proLock: Cloud sync is a Pro feature.
sync.passwordHelp: Pick a strong password — only you know it, and we use it to encrypt your data before it leaves the device.
sync.passwordWarn: If you forget this password, your encrypted data cannot be recovered.
sync.confirmDisable: Stop syncing? Your master password and Google sign-in will be cleared from this device. Your encrypted data in Google Drive is kept.
sync.errNotConfigured: Cloud sync is not configured on this build.
sync.errOauth: Google sign-in failed or was cancelled.
menu.emailRemSub: Get an email before each renewal
emailrem.title: Email reminders
emailrem.blurb: Get an email on the renewal day so you can cancel before being charged. Sent from reminders.leakd.app via our Cloudflare Worker — your email never lands in a third-party CRM.
emailrem.proLock: Email reminders are a Pro feature.
emailrem.testSent: Test email queued — check your inbox
emailrem.langNote: Emails are sent in your current app language ({lang}).
emailrem.errEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
emailrem.errDate: Invalid renewal date — pick a date in the next 2 years.
emailrem.errItem: Subscription name is too long (max 200 characters).
emailrem.errTimeout: The reminder service didn't respond in time.
pdf.title: Subscription Report
